concept: Four independent DK breakout sections with direct strain-relieved pigtails and a short grouped harness
reason: Eliminates four-header coplanarity/preload; exact map retained; cable SI and assembly inspection remain controlled development items

concept: Two split rigid interposers joined by short cables
reason: Reduces but does not eliminate simultaneous rigid engagement and still needs two local stack analyses

concept: One rigid DK connector subset plus auxiliary harnesses
reason: The proven signal map spans CN7 CN8 CN11 and CN12; no single subset carries all required signals and grounds
Still requires four simultaneous connector mates and adds unproven compliance travel alignment and preload behavior
Mechanically tolerant but insufficiently keyed supported and strain-relieved for a controlled interface

concept: Direct wiring to fewer DK connector subsets
reason: Official pin map proves the required allocation spans all four Arduino headers; reducing subsets would change or invent the map
